title: eleutherocarpum escalloniifolium
intro: Eleutherocarpum escalloniifolium is a plant species within the family Boraginaceae. It is traditionally used in medicine for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, particularly in its root extract. The plant has been reported to possess various health benefits, including pain relief, reduced inflammation, and antioxidant activity. In traditional herbal medicine, Eleutherocarpum escalloniifolium can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, or used in combination with other herbs in tinctures and salves.
